omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Information You Provide Directly: We collect the following information when you voluntarily provide it to us, such as during account creation or profile updates: • • Name: To identify your account and personalize your experience. • Email Address: To facilitate account access, send communications, and provide customer support. • Profile Picture and Cover Picture: To allow for a more personalized user profile and interaction. • Couple Anniversary Date: To enhance app functionality and provide tailored content or features.
